severity_rationale: api.23andme.com/robots.txt reveals internal AWS us-west-2 VPC addressing (10.92.0.0/16) and per-pod hostnames. Aids SSRF/internal-service targeting. Also exposes Datadog RUM tokens. Public-internet-reachable file.
response_summary: robots.txt contents include references to 10.92.x.x internal hosts and Datadog RUM tokens.
impact: Internal inventory disclosure accelerates SSRF / internal-network reconnaissance. Datadog RUM token is typically low-sensitivity (client-side observability) but reputation-spam surface.
remediation: Remove internal VPC references from robots.txt. Move RUM tokens to runtime injection from backend, not static file.
